title: PACT v0 frame/Claim record
description: Re-authored from kernel transaction-record.schema.json (TRANSFER-PROVENANCE.md). required[] is the ONLY part the lenient runtime validator (record.js validateRecord) enforces; additionalProperties + patterns are the strict/documentary schema. A v0 record is a PACT frame (spec §2) carrying a Claim payload (spec §3).

type.description: frame type; v0=CLAIM, P2 adds CONTEST (caught defection) + VOUCH; P3 (spec §6) adds PREMISE (a human-owned assumption, creator-bound-on-read), CONFIRM (a cross-verify confirmation of a premise) + ACCEPT (a receiver-local REACH accept of a claim)

payload.description: the Claim (spec §3); any JSON shape. P3 (spec §6) payload conventions, all enforced ON READ (the store is not a sandbox): PREMISE => {statement, scope, creator} (the self-asserted human creator counts ONLY when rootOf(src_persona_did)===creator); CONFIRM/CONTEST of a premise => {target_premise_id}; ACCEPT => {target_claim_id}. DISCRIMINANT (plans/08, ENFORCED type-blind in record.js validateRecord): a record carries AT MOST ONE of {target_claim_id, target_premise_id} — the present field selects the axis (target_claim_id => trust/direct claim-defection or ACCEPT/REACH; target_premise_id => grounding premise-contest). Both is the one cross-layer two-way path; a contest needing both axes MINTS TWO RECORDS.

target_premise_id.description: P3: the ATMS content-address (sha256 of the {statement,scope,creator} premise body via makePremise().id — NOT the frame record_id) that a CONFIRM/CONTEST targets (premise-level cross-verify / contest)

target_claim_id.description: the claim a CONTEST (P2) or an ACCEPT (P3 REACH) targets

creator.description: P3 PREMISE: the SELF-ASSERTED human_uid creator; counts only when rootOf(src_persona_did)===creator (creator-bound-on-read)

config_hash.description: P2 (§1.4): self-asserted config-stability signal (WEAK axis-3); DIRECT keys on (persona, config_hash)

t.description: P2 (§5 dec.6): created_at epoch ms, for exponential decay

idempotency_key.description: optional INV-22 key, re-derivable from the body (record.js deriveIdempotencyKey)

sig.description: optional ed25519 signature over record_id (base64); verified by the frame layer (spec §2)
